_comment: Accepted-known advisories: all transitive in the x402-fetch / viem web3 + wallet-connector tree (@reown/appkit, @walletconnect/*, wagmi, @metamask/sdk, @coinbase/*, viem, socket.io-client, ws, uuid). index.js uses only the x402 paid-fetch path (sign + settle) and never imports these browser wallet connectors, so they are not reachable from the running MCP server. No criticals. The one directly-fixable advisory (form-data) is patched via the package.json overrides block, not accepted here. Revisit when x402-fetch / viem ship patched deps.
_policy: The gate BLOCKS on any advisory not listed here, and on ANY critical severity regardless of this list.
